beats.narration: An inspection you can't prove is an opinion. Years from now, audits and failure investigations read your record, not the weld.

payload.title: THE RECORD
payload.sub: Turning what you saw into a record that stands up.

beats.narration: Every technical image needs identification, a weld or part number; a scale for dimensional reference; and traceability: date, examiner, and the report.
Capture at adequate resolution and light compression. The unedited original is the record: enhance copies only, and document it. Retention comes from the code.
The last piece is you. Your certification, vision exam, and level define what you may perform and report. A lapsed certificate fails the audit.
Here's the rule: if it isn't recorded, it didn't happen. Build records that speak for you long after you've left the site.

payload.sub: The record speaks for you long after you've left the site.
